Da-in deliberately causes terror to enhance Stardust's abilities and preemptively prevents all the tragic events from the original story, but in the process, he gains public support while also drawing Stardust's suspicion. Stardust, who initially opposed him, gradually opens her heart, and soon even begins to show signs of obsession toward him...?

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 해골전령 이야기
summary:
120 years have passed since the First Emperor’s death. Venlyra, a powerful rogue and trusted herald of the Emperor, awakens from a long slumber to a crumbling empire that has strayed from the light. Once more, the Skeleton Messenger makes the rounds, bound for a decaying throne, and for the embers of a self long thought extinguished within. Hear ye, hear ye! Hark, and heed the Emperor’s words! The hour of reckoning is upon you!

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 연산군의 셰프로 살아남기
summary:
Modern-day culinary genius Ji-Yeong suddenly finds herself transported back to the Joseon Dynasty, trapped in the royal kitchens of the most notorious tyrant in history. To keep her head on her shoulders, she must satisfy the volatile cravings of King Yeon-San-- a man whose legendary temper is as sharp as the chef’s own knives. With political rivals plotting her downfall and a mad king watching her every move, can Ji-Yeong’s 21st-century recipes serve as her ultimate shield, or will her next meal be her last?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 미모사
summary:
The war around the Curtains at the center of the world came to a close. But war was not the only thing left after the Curtains fell. Those who pursue the Curtains, those who seek to raise them, those who wield special powers, living weapons of war, those who disturb the peace, those who bring hope, those who face the lives they’ve lived, and those who try to revive the corpses in the coffin on their backs. We call them Actors.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 풍요의 여신과 천재 망나니 사도님
summary:
Earth’s life force is depleted, and it’s dying. Humanity’s only hope lies with Dispatchers, heroes sent to otherworldly realms to retrieve energy for survival. Chan-Su Oh is one of them, but despite his legendary father, he has zero talent. However, things change when Chan-Su is sent to the Block-Style Territory Expansion World as the Apostle of a forgotten, weakened Goddess of Abundance. Armed with nothing but a modified harvesting skill and a desperate drive to find his parents, Chan-Su must reclaim his territory block by block. From wretched outcast to genius apostle, the hunt to restore his Goddess begins now!

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 악녀 언니를 구하러 온 용감한 강아지입니다
summary:
When Coco dies after five happy years with her owner Chloe, she thinks her tail-wagging days are over. But Coco can't bear to stay in the afterlife as she watches Chloe's world crumble. Taking pity on her, the Puppy God grants Coco's wish to return. Now, she's a human child who gets adopted into Chloe's family. Unfortunately, she discovers that reaching Chloe's heart is harder than any trick she's ever learned. Can she fetch the joy Chloe has lost, or has their bond slipped away like a leash?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 브레이커즈
summary:
Choose your player: a noble hero intent on saving the world, or a devious demon prince hell-bent on conquering it? A normal choice when playing a new game, but when gaming nerd In-gong Ju wakes up inside the VR game Knight Saga:RE, he finds himself playing as Siutra, a tiny, gnome-like ninth prince of the demon kingdom. In-gong must work quickly to unlock a range of potentially overpowered skills to help him level up and win over his siblings before the Day of Massacres, when they’ll all be slaughtered by the game’s antagonist, Zephyr Ragnaroth.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 마론 후작
summary:
Once reviled as the wicked magician Hailey, the most hated woman in the realm, she was cast into a poisoned wasteland to die. But death never came. A year later, she’s alive and farming, bickering with a tree fairy, and somehow the new Marchioness Maron. As secrets of the contamination zone begin to surface and the ghosts of her past return, Hailey must decide whether to seek vengeance or build something new from ruins. When survival itself becomes the greatest twist of fate, who needs revenge?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 그 악녀가 검을 든 이유
summary:
No one knows how the pampered and wicked Erin Lisus suddenly becomes a top swordsman at Atenz Academy. That's because they don't realize that Erin was actually transported to the past after being killed by her stepmother and was reborn into different worlds. Now, with her past experience as a swordmaster, Erin's out to get revenge and rescue her allies from her stepmother's grasp. But with foes at every corner, can Erin save her loved ones? Or will her reason to wield the sword vanish with them?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 빙의한 악녀가 깽판 침
summary:
A demon from the underworld possessing a human?! 


Bella, the demon and monarch of the underworld, is possessed by the villainess Isabella Dunkeld, hated by her family and pointed at by everyone as a villainess. 'How did I end up in this body?' She has no memory of making a contract with the human Isabella, and when she came to, she was trapped in Isabella's body with all her powers sealed. She decides to act like a 'human' for the time being, but...

 "So how many people have I killed with these hands? Hundreds? Thousands?"

 "Huh... You didn't kill a single person?"

 "You're calling me a villainess when you didn't kill a single person?"

 
The demon Bella really finds humans difficult...

(Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: 남궁세가 손녀딸의 귀환
summary:
Because she was kidnapped and raised by the Blood Demon, Seolhwa destroyed the Namgung Clan, unaware that she was its lost child. When she learned the truth only after being killed by the master who used her, she awakens eight years in the past and returns home to try and change fate. But a dark spell and forbidden seals keep her from speaking the truth. Can Seolhwa change the future of her clan and prepare Namgung for what’s to come? Or will her family's blood spill once again?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 뒷골목 마법사의 회귀생활
summary:
Once a loyal hound to a powerful magic family, Aster was used, betrayed, and killed. But death wasn’t the end—it was a second chance. Back in the back alleys of his youth, Aster now holds the future’s secrets in his hands. This time, he won’t serve anyone. Can a man who once served power learn to become his own master? 

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 결혼 장사2 ~잊히지 않을 노래~
summary:
Cyril Ireon de Sevran, a young and powerless king, was betrayed and murdered after his only supporter, Alexandra de Arno, died in war. But when he opens his eyes again, he is shocked to see her younger self who doesn't recognize him. Cyril vows to protect Alexandra and her dream of becoming a knight this time. Still, threats lurk at every turn, including the very person who killed them both. Will Cyril save the one dear to him and change the future? Or will fate just repeat itself?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 판타지 세계 속 바바리안으로 살아가기
summary:
Ketal the Barbarian never imagined that his dream of fantastical magic, epic kingdoms, and grand quests would start in the freezing, monster-filled White Tundra. After battling snow and fierce beasts, he reaches the wider world, only to find everyone is baffled by such a polite barbarian who asks too many questions and sends foes flying like ragdolls. Ketal just wants the adventure he's always wished for. But can a world that expects a brute handle a barbarian who refuses to be one?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 대공비가 체질입니다
summary:
Annette Fraise was supposed to die as the novel’s wicked villainess. Instead, she’s using her 21st-century charm to survive her marriage to the cursed Grand Duke of the North, Loic Blenheim. Between one awkward accident, a magical curse, and a one-year marriage contract, love might just become the plot twist that changes everything.



(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 몬스터와 힐링하는 S급 헌터
summary:
Chimera hunter Number 17 has spent decades hunting monsters. On his latest mission, he’s ordered to ensure the human hunters’ escape and never return to base. In other words, he’s meant to die. As his body dissolves, his life flashes before him: kidnapped as a boy, forced into endless battles, reduced to a mindless weapon. But against all odds, his body reforms into his human form. No longer Chimera Hunter Number 17, he stands before a vast open land on his own two feet as Do-un Cheon, a human, ready to start his life anew, making friends out of monsters and building the family he never had.



(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 턴제의 마법사
summary:
After easily beating the Abyss of the Maze on its highest difficulty, Kaleb faces a new challenge…surviving his favorite video game for real! Even as a powerful mage, Kaleb learns things won’t be as easy as foes pretend to be friends, allies need rescuing, and danger is always a turn away. Armed with an insider’s knowledge and a magic hourglass that allows him to plan devastating attacks, Kaleb must save his friends and prepare for a battle with the Maze Master if he ever wants to get home!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 내 새끼 데뷔시키려다 내가 데뷔하게 생김
summary:
With her weird talents and weirder personality, idol trainee Yoon Hyesung can't help but catch everyone's eye, even though that's far from what she wants. She's actually a fangirl from a different future with one goal in mind—help Na Yeonwoo debut as an idol! Now as Yeonwoo's friend, Hyesung is determined to get Yeonwoo the top spot on an idol survival program with the help of an oddly supportive game system. Can Hyesung help Yeonwoo debut, even if it means she will too?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 남주가 제 건강에 집착합니다
summary:
The Caretakers' Council is a group of dedicated servants with only one goal: to nurse terminally ill Arelyn Halbern back to health. But Arelyn is already resigned to her fate, knowing she's simply an extra in a novel meant to die young. That is, until Crown Prince Pession Allermand takes an interest in her. Now, Pession visits Arelyn daily, nagging her to eat better, play, and be more active. With the novel's male lead lending his strength, can Arelyn finally find the will to fight her illness?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 후회물 여주인데 멘탈이 너무 강함
summary:
Giselle Florette wakes up in a grovel romance where the male leads and villains alike torment her until her ultimate death. To avoid meeting the same ending, Giselle decides to act out and show she's not one to be messed with. Little did she know, this would catch the eye of Duke Vientin Kallinos, the infamous "Bloody Mastermind," who proposes a contractual marriage. With her newfound audacity and unexpected supporter, will Giselle fend off those who wronged her and rewrite her tragic fate?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 빌런의 프로파일러
summary:
After surviving a brutal childhood tragedy and awakening from a mysterious coma, Shinyeok Lee returns with the mind of a genius profiler and fifteen years’ worth of knowledge that no one can explain. Now, he reads the lies of the living and uncovers the truths of the dead, solving crimes no one else can. But every case brings him closer to the murderer who destroyed his family. Can Shinhyeok expose the ultimate villain, or will the darkness he studies consume him first?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 날 속인 대가는 목숨으로 받겠습니다
summary:
Raised as the perfect assassin for her captor's revenge, Ayla finally learns the truth of her kidnapping as she takes her dying breath. When she wakes up again years in the past, she vows then and there to turn his own plan for vengeance against him. But as she begins to unravel his plot, she discovers that she was just a small pawn in an even greater scheme. With so much at stake, will Ayla succeed in her revenge? Or will she be dragged further into something she never wanted to be a part of?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 멸망한 왕국의 3왕자가 회귀했다
summary:
Between looming war, fighting nobles, and an overbearing father, Prince Yuri Briol has a lot on his shoulders. He's also carrying knowledge of his past life while trying to change the course of history. This cast of characters includes a famed assassin, a powerful mage, a loyal maid, and a lazy knight among the character-filled kingdom of Briol. Yuri may be the third-born prince, but he could also be the most important factor in his family and kingdom's survival.

(Source: Tapas)

title: 권왕환생
summary:
Wuseong Dan, the man who ruled over the martial world with his fists alone. After unexpectedly losing a duel against two practitioners of the Demonic Way, he’s reborn into the body of the wild child heir apparent of the affluent Silver River Merchants. Not one to leave debts unpaid, be they to his benefit or detriment, Wuseong sets out on his path of revenge in the body of Jineon Lee. Using his knowledge of martial arts from his past life and the wealth of his current life, he only has one goal: get stronger and kill those who killed him.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 신데렐라는 이 멧밭쥐가 데려갑니다
summary:
Everyone knows the Cinderella story, but few know that her "happily ever after" only lasted 10 years. When the prince betrays her, a harvest mouse named Elodie is desperate to help her as her loyal friend. Elodie's wish brings about a miracle—she finds herself back in the past and discovers that she has the ability to shapeshift into a human. With this newfound power, she is ready to rewrite the ending of Cinderella's story. Will the two friends be able to find their own happily ever after?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 검을 든 꽃
summary:
Echineacea Roaz is graceful, beautiful, and impeccably dressed, even on the dueling grounds. Yet beneath the lace gloves and silk hats is a deadly swordsman with a dark secret. As the Demon of the Cursed Sword, she once slaughtered all she loved, including Captain Eurien, the one man who believed in her. Granted one chance to rewrite fate, she turns back time and joins the knighthood to protect those she once failed. Can this elegant swordsman bloom anew, or will she cut everything down again?



(Source: Tapas)

title: 은해상단 막내아들
summary:
After his brutal death at the sword of a rival head merchant, Seoho Eun finds he’s been given a new opportunity when he reawakens in his younger body, decades earlier! Now armed with years of learned wisdom and first-hand knowledge of future events, the young master is determined to use this chance to right his wrongs, make better choices, and give himself, his guild, and especially his family, everything they deserve!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 신성력은 돈으로 사겠습니다
summary:
When a former detective wakes up as Ordelle Kyris, the villainess and fake saint of the novel "Idella the Holy," she is entrusted with the task of saving the Sun God and this world from disappearing forever. However, being a fake, her divine power is close to nothing. And the only way to increase it is... money! From securing rich followers to starting a new business, Ordelle strives to gather funds and gain more power. Will this fake yet fiery saint successfully climb the ladder of holiness?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 대공님의 신부는 지옥의 전사
summary:
Alicia Sirius Rayne, a timid, stuttering spinster betrothed to the rumored "Grand Duchess Serial Killer," falls into Hell after opening a mysterious artifact. Now, she must adapt to survive. Years later, she has become a fierce warrior. But as she sets out to conquer all of Hell -- she wakes up in the past. Armed with a second chance at life and a new goal, Alicia must actively pursue the feared Grand Duke Reikart Tessen to secure her destiny. Can this fierce warrior from Hell win the heart of the man who has "killed" six grand duchesses?!

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 계약 남편이 남자 주인공과 닮았다
summary:
At the age of 8, Anya Lockhart realizes she's been born into a tragic dark romance novel she read in her past life. And unfortunately, she's the female lead destined to fall into the crazy emperor's clutches! So when his proposal arrives, she packs up and runs away from home. After years on the run, she meets Dale, a sweet mercenary living in a remote southern village. But is there more to Dale than meets the eye? The more she learns, the more he doesn't seem like an ordinary mercenary...

(Source: Tapas)

title: 원수였던 언니가 나를 아낀다
summary:
After a life of misfortune resulting in death at the hands of her sister, Calista, Harper wakes up again as her 8-year-old self. Realizing she's been given another chance at life, Harper is determined to stay out of the way and avoid becoming her sister's target. Unfortunately, her plan to go unnoticed goes awry when the sister who once hated her seems to be interested in her instead! But maybe this is for the better... if Harper can make Calista like her, she won't try to kill her, right?!



(Source: Tapas)

title: 게임 폐인의 리셋 라이프
summary:
After six years, gaming nerd Lee Jinho finally finishes Reset Life, a brutal mobile game where you have to clear 99 different lives. Just as the thrill of victory fades and emptiness takes hold, a sudden message reveals the game has merged with reality. The true 100th round begins, marking the start of his real reset life. Now, armed with his knowledge from the game, Jinho sets out to reclaim all the skills he once mastered, living as a model, actor, chef, and more in his ultimate new life!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 더 복서
summary:
You’ve got the raw talent. Or you’re the underdog. But do you have the heart? Do you have what it takes? Let’s see what you’re made of. The real fight starts now! 



(Source: WEBTOON)



Note: Includes 30 extra chapters.

title: 도굴왕
summary:
Mysterious tombs appeared all over the world one day, each containing a relic which grants its owner supernatural abilities. Joo-Heon Suh is a tomb explorer, excavator, and raider. Betrayed by his employer, he's about to die at the hands of a powerful new relic when he suddenly finds himself 15 years in the past, before any relics or tombs made their debut. Driven by feelings of revenge, how will Joo-Heon use his knowledge of the future to become the Tomb Raider King? 



(Source: Tapas)


Note: Includes 14 extra chapters.

title: 노블레스
summary:
Rai wakes up from an 820-year-long sleep and starts his new life as a student in a high school founded by his loyal servant, Frankenstein. But his peaceful days with other human students are soon interrupted by mysterious attackers known as the "Unions."



(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 나 혼자만 레벨업 : 라그나로크
summary:
In a world of gates, monsters, and hunters galore, Soo-Ho Sung is…well, he’s just an ordinary college student. Sure, his parents went missing right before the gates started appearing three years ago, and he occasionally had a weird dream where he could beat up monsters and level up like a video game, but other than that? There’s absolutely nothing special about him. So when a sudden monster outbreak occurs on his campus, he must fight back every instinct screaming at him to run away as he takes a page out of his dad’s book and rushes to save his classmate. The chances of making it alive are looking bleak, until—PING! [Congratulations on becoming a Player.]

(Source: Ize Press)

title: 튜토리얼 탑의 고인물
summary:
After being trapped for 12 years in a tower full of regenerating monsters, Hyeon-U Kim is more powerful than just about any human or monster on Earth. Now that he’s free, he’s determined to find out who was behind his imprisonment, even if that means he has to kill hordes of monsters — and inadvertently save the world — along the way.


(Source: WEBTOON, edited)


Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: 화이트 블러드
summary:
All pure-blooded vampire Ha-Yan Park wanted to do was live a normal life. But the rise of half-bloods ten years ago transformed the world into a dangerous and frightening place—robbing her of her one true wish. Determined to return Korea to how it used to be, Ha-Yan teams up with local police captain Eun-Tae Hwang to wipe out the bloodthirsty killers in a tale of hot-blooded romance and revenge.   



(Source: Yen Press, edited)



Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: 더 게이머
summary:
이유도 모른 채 현실이 게임처럼 뒤바뀐다면 어떻게 될까?
레벨이 오르고, 스테이터스를 올릴 수 ..

title: 안나라수마나라
summary: 장난감 공장을 하던 아버지가 사기를 당해 빚쟁이를 피해 도망 다니고 어머니는 가출한 집에서 어린 여동생과 함께 살고 있는 여고생 소녀 가장 윤아이. 학교를 다니면서 아르바이트로 힘겹게 생활을 꾸리지만 도시락을 싸지 못해 남몰래 물로 배를 채우는 것이 일상이다. 어느 날, 겨우 가불 받은 만 원짜리 지폐가 바람에 날리는 것을 쫓아가다가, 버려진 유원지에서 미쳤다는 소문이 도는 마술사와 마주치고, 마술사는 대뜸 물어본다.

title: 신마경천기
summary:
In an ancient world where martial artists reign supreme, Un-Seong can only watch as his master is brutally beaten to death after a false accusation of practicing forbidden demonic arts. Even after a valiant fight, he fails to kill those responsible and faces his own end. But fate has other plans… Instead of taking his last breath, he awakens as a child, training to be an elite soldier of a demonic sect. Now Un-Seong must embrace the demonic arts and harness power in his ultimate quest for revenge.



(Source: Tapas)


Note: Includes six extra chapters.

title: 돼지우리
summary:
A relaxing getaway in paradise, or a death trap? A young man wakes up on a breathtaking beach, but he has no idea who he is or how he got there. Try as he might to piece it all together, untangling this mind-bending mystery won’t be easy when every clue leads to more maddening questions... and the family that welcomes him into their home is not what they seem.


(Source: WEBTOON)


Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: 다이스
summary:
모든 걸 바꾸는 정육면체 - [다이스].
다이스(DICE)를 둘러싼 소년소녀들의 판타지 게임!

title: 열렙전사
summary:
When you go from level 99 to level 1 and start all over again.


(Source: WEBTOON)



Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: 사내 맞선
summary:
After being worked to the bone at her office job, getting introduced to her longtime crush’s new girlfriend, and dealing with her family’s debt hanging over her head, Hari Shin's life seems to have hit rock bottom. Luckily, her friend Youngseo has a business proposal for her: go to an arranged date in her stead and Hari will receive a hefty compensation. Things grow complicated, however, when it turns out that the other party is Hari’s new CEO—and he's dead-set on marrying whoever shows up to the date! 



(Source: Yen Press)

title: 테이밍 마스터
summary: The best-known VR game in the world, 'Kaillan'. A certified game addict well known in the virtual world, Ian. Despite having a Level 93 Archer character in the top leaderboards of Kaillan, Ian decides to delete it despite everyone around him telling him not to. All to convert to a hidden class he obtained by chance. The class he chose is the most worthless class in Kaillan, the Summoner class. If he wants to avoid getting an F in college, he needs to level up to his previous level within two months... Kaillan is notorious for its very cruel leveling system, where it is said to take over a year to reach level 100. His struggles to reach level 93 in only two months unfold... Level quickly, thoroughly and persistently. The legend of the 'Taming Master' begins!

title: 오렌지 마말레이드
summary:
뱀파이어 정체를 숨긴 전학생 백마리와 인기 남학생 정재민.
석우 작가가 그리는 그들의 감성적인 판타지 로맨스.

title: 내 남편과 결혼해줘
summary:
When Jiwon, a 37-year-old cancer patient, walks in on her husband and best friend, she realizes her whole life has been a lie. What’s worse, she dies a tragic death at the hands of her husband. Would things have been different if she had made different choices? Fortunately for Jiwon, she is given the chance to rewrite her fate when she is reincarnated as her younger self. This time, she vows to live a happy life. But first comes revenge. Her plan? To marry off her now former best friend to her lying, cheating husband. 


(Source: WEBTOON)


Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: 랜덤채팅의 그녀!
summary:
If you lived through – or are still living through – high school, you can relate to Joon-U. An outcast and a loner, his only joy comes from the hours he spends on his phone, randomly chatting with strangers. It’s all weird and meaningless, until Joon-U strikes gold – as he’s matched in a private chat with a pretty young girl his age. Jackpot! But when he discovers that this same pretty girl is actually his classmate Seong-A, things get a little too real for a guy who’s never even remotely been kissed.

(Source: WEBTOON, edited)


Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: 성좌들이 내 제자
summary:
300 years ago, the invincible warrior Hyeon-Oh Kim brought down the Tower of the End, preventing the world’s demise. Though he should have died the moment the Tower of the End collapsed, Hyeon-Oh is reborn 300 years later in the body of a 17-year-old boy named Ju-Hyeok Kim. Meanwhile, he discovers the existence of the Constellations, who were once his disciples 300 years ago but were born during the time when he did not exist in this world. Will he be able to find them again and train them?



(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: 잔불의 기사
summary:
When Na-Gyunn’s twin brother, Na-Jin, is murdered before his very eyes, he vows to avenge his brother’s death by assuming Na-Jin’s identity. But although the two may look alike, when it comes to fighting, Na-Gyunn lacks the talent and skill his brother possessed. In order to successfully execute his plot for revenge, Na-Gyunn resolves to train himself to become the prodigious knight-in-training his brother once was. Will Na-Gyunn be able to keep his identity a secret before others begin to catch on to his act?



(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 밥만 먹고 레벨업
summary:
Kang Min-Hyuk suffers from a rare disorder that makes it impossible for him to stop eating. Despite strict diet and exercise, Min-Hyuk's weight is now life-threatening. As a last resort, his doctor recommends a unique treatment—Athenae, a VR game where one can eat as much as they want without consequence. Crispy fried chicken! Scrumptious samgyetang! Inside Athenae, all food tastes real, but earning it is no cakewalk. In order to live, Min-Hyuk must go on the ultimate fantasy gourmet adventure!



(Source: Tapas, edited)



Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: 죽음에 관하여
summary:
삶과 죽음의 경계선, 그 곳엔 누가 있을까?
"가는 길에 심심한데 네 이야기나 한번 듣지"

title: 4컷용사
summary:
After defeating the Demon King, our Hero saves the princess and rides off into the horizon to start a new life... In his dreams... Little did he know that unemployment and mediocrity awaited him. Comic Fantasy at its best. 

(Source: Lezhin US)


Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: 심연의 하늘
summary:
한치 앞도 보이지 않는 어둠 속 서울. 도대체 무슨 일이 벌어진 걸까?
재난으로 파괴된 대한민국. 생존을 위한 인간들의 잔혹한 축제가 벌어진다.
이 재난의 마지막 생존자는 누가 될 것인가

title: 슈퍼 시크릿
summary:
The boy next door, friends for life, is actually a werewolf! 



(Source: WEBTOONS)

title: 닥터 프로스트
summary:
당신의 마음을 읽는 천재 심리학자 닥터 프로스트.
다양한 인간 군상들의 마음의 질병을 파헤치는 그의 활약이 펼쳐진다.

title: 재벌집 막내아들
summary:
After thirteen years as a loyal employee of the Soonyang Group, South Korea’s largest business empire, Hyeon-U is rewarded with betrayal–and murdered–by his employers! Miraculously, he’s given a second chance, reborn back in time as Dojun Jin, grandson of the founder of the corporate dynasty that betrayed him. In a daring quest to rewrite destiny, he will not only attempt to settle the score; he will aim for the ultimate hostile takeover.



(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment, edited)

title: 스피릿 핑거스
summary:
What do you do if you're going on 18, totally awkward and lacking in self-confidence? You could just sit in your room all day and all night and study and wonder why you never get asked out…OR, if you’re Woo-Yeon Song you could join up with the Spirit Fingers – the strangest, hippest, coolest (yet most welcoming) art club ever. But as Woo-Yeon is about to learn, discovering your TRUE colors is about more than just painting.



(Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: 하렘의 남자들
summary:
Scorned by her lover and thrown into power after the mysterious assassination of her father, Latil must marry to secure her sovereignty of Tarium. Instead of choosing one man to become her Royal Consort, she chooses five young men from all walks of life to join her Harem. Will Latil ever solve her father’s murder, and can she keep the peace in her Harem?



(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 부활남
summary:
If there’s one thing Hwan Seok can’t stand, it’s witnessing injustice. But this time, getting involved with a pair of men targeting his next-door neighbor, Yerin, costs him his life. Three days after his murder, Hwan Seok wakes up…. alive! Armed with his newfound ability to be brought back to life after three days, Seok is determined to save Yerin but soon realizes he's gotten himself entangled in a plot bigger and more sinister than he originally imagined...


(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 이섭의 연애
summary:
With her outstanding business acumen, Min-Gyeong Kang climbed the corporate ranks of TK Group, Korea’s top conglomerate, to become a senior manager in record time. But after 10 years at the company, she’s been assigned to be the secretary of I-Seop Tae, the successor to TK Group. The two entered the company at the same time, but ever since he came second place to her at new employee training, I-Seop’s never taken kindly to Min-Gyeong. She’s better than him in every way and trampled all over his ego… so why can’t he stop thinking about her?



(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: 아비무쌍
summary:
Ga-Jang No is a strong, dedicated, and humble man, with much respect for the martial arts. After the death of his lovely wife, this muscle-for-hire just wants an easy job that allows him to be a good father to his three little babies. He’s even happy to pull guard duty and fend off amateur fighters if it means he can return home safely each night. But when a creepy cult starts stealing children from the city, Ga-Jang must step up to the challenge and discover his true warrior potential. 



(Source: Tapas, edited)

title: 나 혼자 만렙 귀환자
summary:
The world falls into a state of panic when 120 million players of a popular VR game, Eternal World, vanish without a trace one day. A few months later, they begin returning one by one after dying in the game. But they’re not the only ones to make it back—monsters also start to appear and wreak havoc on Earth. All hope seems lost until the Masked Monarch, the most powerful player of Eternal World, returns. He quickly assembles his old team back together to defeat the beasts and the nefarious Demon King once and for all. But man-made weapons are useless against the enemies they must fight, and players are struggling to level up without the game’s special items or rewards. The Masked Monarch has a few tricks up his sleeve, but will they be enough to save the world?



(Source: Tappytoon)


Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: 남들 로판 여주 할 때 나는 장롱 괴물 됨
쌍둥이에게 아내 자리를 빼앗겼다
summary:
남편은 내가 아니라 나의 쌍둥이를 사랑했다.
결혼기념일 날, 내 저택에서 부정을 저질렀을 정도로.
역겨운 진실을 알게 된 다음 날.
나는 쌍둥이, 글로리아를 추궁했다.
“다른 여자랑 놀아날 바에야 그래도 너랑 똑같이 생긴 내가 낫지 않아?”
돌아온 것은 정신 나간 소리뿐이었지만.

title: 던전을 그리는 화가
summary:
In a world forever changed by the Great Cataclysm that reshaped the entire globe... Seo Jio, an ordinary art teacher, dies in a sudden fire, only to awaken trapped inside a portrait as a painting himself. Within the world of the portrait, Jio gains omnipotent abilities. He can create life and even open gateways to other dimensions. As he travels across countless dimensions, Jio encounters people bound by fate and uses his newfound abilities to help them overcome the trials before them. But with every dimension he crosses and every incident he resolves, he draws closer to uncovering the truth shrouding his own death…

(Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: 망한 세계를 게임으로 착각시켰다
summary:
“Let’s Make Them Mistake a Ruined World for a Game”
Kim Jinwoo, a game director, was one day summoned to another world called “Arsilan.”
After struggling through a harsh life, he eventually rose to become an archmage. However, Arsilan was on the brink of destruction due to entities known as “Erosion.”
Jinwoo, who came from Earth, was the only one immune to Erosion. But even as an archmage, facing countless Erosions alone within the short span of three years was impossible.
“I suppose I want to let everything go and rest now.”
Just as Jinwoo gave up on everything and emptied his mind, he became a Transcendent.
Through the “Gate of Souls,” an absolute authority he obtained upon becoming a Transcendent, Jinwoo gained the ability to travel between Earth and Arsilan.
Using the Gate of Souls, he began summoning Earthlings—who were also immune to Erosion—to Arsilan, making them believe it was a game and having them fight against the Erosion.
Thus began the project known as the “Arsilan Saga Project.”

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: 도굴왕: 엔드라인
summary:
Stories are power. Artifacts born from myths and folktales granted humanity abilities and wealth, sparking a brutal war for their ownership. After conquering that war, I became the King of Artifacts, Majesty. But when humanity was forcibly reset and the Majesty War began, I realized my victory was only the beginning. Now, I’ll reclaim everything stolen from me, overturn myths, steal the rules, and plunder worlds by my own law.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 스위트홈
summary:
After an unexpected family tragedy, a reclusive high school student is forced to leave his home -- only to face something much scarier: a reality where monsters are trying to wipe out humanity. Now he must fight alongside a handful of reluctant heroes to try and save the world before it’s too late.


(Source: WEBTOON)


Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: 갓 오브 하이스쿨
summary:
전국, 전세계 고등학생 중 가장 쎈 녀석을 뽑는 대회가 열린다.
허구 100% 막장 액션의 끝!! 기대하시라!!!

title: 나 혼자 만렙 뉴비
summary:
Kang Jin-Hyeok, a gaming streamer, and content creator is the only person who has cleared the game, [Tower of Trials]. However, as the game’s popularity declines, it becomes increasingly difficult for him to continue making a living as a content creator. Jinhyeok prepares to end his 11-year-long relationship with the game and say goodbye to his humble group of subscribers. But on that very day, the Tower of Trials appears in reality with a message saying that humanity will perish unless all players clear each floor within 90 days. Jin-Hyeok, who knows the game better than anyone, decides to use his knowledge to his advantage and dominate the tower. It’s time to show everyone what a hardcore gamer can do!



(Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: 장편단편선
summary:
A collection of short stories spanning a variety of genres, offering the thrill of a full-length film. Enjoy a diverse range of short stories, spanning thrillers, comedy, drama, and romance.

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: 사랑하는 나의 억압자
summary:
When the hand that used to so lovingly hold Annette Rozenberg ends up being the one that causes the downfall of her family, Annette demands that Heiner Waldemar give her a divorce. But Heiner refuses, stating that he must see her miserable by his side, no matter what. At odds, the two continue a precarious relationship, only to be met with wounds of the past that bring them tragically together.



(Source: WEBTOON)


Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: 황제와 비밀 연애 중인데 나는 그걸 몰라
summary:
My Perfect Boyfriend Was Actually a Tyrannical Emperor?


In a romance novel where a war-obsessed tyrant falls in love with a sun-like saintly heroine, Carolina is reincarnated as an extra with absolutely no connection to the original plot. For Lina, an ordinary working girl who cares more about whether she has to work late tomorrow than about the romance of the century, her mundane daily life is turned upside down when, one day, a boyfriend with dazzling good looks appears as if by fate...



...I had no idea back then.


“...Lina. Are you planning to eat the emperor and run?”


That the cutest, most lovable boyfriend in the world was actually the Emperor!



A secret romance born of a misunderstanding, Lina’s heartbreaking efforts to protect her boyfriend from the cruel Emperor (?)!
A sweet yet dangerous romance inside the imperial palace between a clueless girl and a straight-talking Emperor!


(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 공작 부인의 남편을 찾습니다
summary:
“Stop whining, it’s annoying.”


The sudden change and betrayal of her husband, who had been a son-in-law by marriage. Artia, slowly wearing down in the duke’s mansion where she had no allies, threw herself into the lake, and the moment she opened her eyes again, she was transformed into a different person. Having finally shaken up high society and succeeded in a miraculous divorce, Artia begins to casually look for a second husband at the insistence of the family elders…


“After going through such a difficult divorce, why are you already looking for a husband?”



For some reason, the Second Prince Kilian, famous as the “Mad Prince", keeps hovering around her!


Will Artia be able to welcome her second husband safely?

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 멍문세가를 호령하는 아기 고양이입니다
summary:
The coming-of-age story of a kitten who finds herself in the middle of a dog clan!


Hong-Seol, a cat-human hybrid, was abandoned by her parents because she couldn’t use her inner energy. After a miserable death, she opens her eyes to find herself back at the moment just before she died.


"You are the child I’ve been searching for. Would you like to learn martial arts from me?"



With nowhere else to go, Hong-Seol is approached by the formidable “dog” shu-in clan, the Grand Patriarch of the Namgung Clan, who extends a helping hand. To survive, Hong-Seol enters the Namgung Clan.



“If they find out I’m a cat shu-in, I’ll be kicked out for sure!”



Whether they know of Hong-Seol’s daily struggle to walk on thin ice or not, these dogs come to visit her every day, wagging their tails.
Except for one: the prickly eldest dog, Namgung Baek.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 이 황제는 결혼 사기를 칩니다
summary:
Just as I was getting used to a novel where I’d been possessed by an unstoppable will to survive, an unusual little kid rolled into my life. It was hard enough just to make ends meet, but I couldn’t turn away from those cute little eyes, so I raised him with all my care.


“I’m going to marry you. Sign the marriage registration form for me.”


“Later, later~ If you still feel the same way when you’re all grown up, then write your name down.”



Since minors aren’t even eligible to file, I just signed it as a joke, but they say the marriage registration was accepted? And on top of that, the true identity of the little one in my house… is the Emperor?! I got tricked by the scheming male lead’s disguise and ended up getting married!

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 새벽의 소네트
summary:
Ah, the headstrong Charlotte Augusta? She really doesn’t seem like an Augusta at all. There’s a reason she still has no suitors even after three seasons in society.



Charlotte Augusta, the third of the five sisters from the renowned Augusta family in British high society. Charlotte, who was treated like a black sheep among her beautiful sisters, causes a major scandal at a ball she attended—as usual—in search of a husband. And there, she meets a handsome man with a refined charm. Prince Leopold of the Kingdom of Holland, a handsome man visible only to Charlotte’s eyes, agrees to clean up the mess she made and help her find England’s finest suitor—in exchange for her help in locating his own body, the whereabouts of which are unknown.


“Don’t worry, Lady. You won’t lose out on anything. As you help me, you’ll end up meeting every single one of England’s most eligible bachelors.”



And so, as the two of them put their heads together every dawn when Leopold’s spirit awoke, the closer they got to their goal, the more confused they became by the feelings welling up toward each other…

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 공작님과 이러면 안 되는 걸 알지만
summary:
“After spending a night with the duke I’d been secretly pining for, I was offered a contract marriage.”


Elin, who had been steadfastly enduring the increasingly severe torment from her stepmother and stepsister, runs into her secret crush, Dominic, at a ball. While looking after a drunken Dominic, Elin ends up spending the night with him...


Meanwhile, Dominic, who must marry to secure a deal with the Crown Prince, proposes a marriage of convenience to Elin while searching for a suitable partner...!

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: 남주와 여주가 헤어졌다
summary:
I am “Villainess Belita” from a romance fantasy novel. I’ve possessed the body of a character destined for a gruesome death—one who stalks the male lead, torments the female lead, and meets a tragic end. If I want to survive, there’s only one solution: call off the engagement with the male lead before the novel begins and leave this city. After meticulous planning, I succeeded in ending the engagement and secured a diamond mine as alimony.


…I thought I was finally safe— But then came the shocking news that the male and female leads had broken up. The male lead, who used to despise me, confesses his love, the female lead looks up to me like a savior, and the man who was originally destined to kill me is now flirting with me. Even a character who didn’t exist in the original story says he’ll risk his life for me. But even though the original story has turned into such a mess… what’s with this unfairness where only the events driving me to my death are still unfolding as planned? In this chaotic mess of the original story, will I… be able to survive?

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 엔딩인 줄 알고 돌아왔더니 장르가 바뀜
summary:
Though I was the villainess in the original novel, I skillfully avoided death flags and faked my own demise to escape. I saved the poor child destined to die, sacrificed myself so the protagonists could live peaceful lives, and hid away, waiting for my own happy ending.
My joy at finally hearing news of the original protagonists' wedding was short-lived. Upon receiving word of my mother's passing, I returned home... My childhood friend and fiancé, the original male lead, said:


“If I knew you'd fall for a mere death notice, I would've done it sooner.”


The man I thought had married another woman stared at me with deranged eyes and laughed. Why are you like this? You weren't this kind of person.


“Now you can't go anywhere.”

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 사이코패스 흑막과 파혼하는 50가지 방법
summary:
The novel Evelyn Florence wakes up in has an 18+ rating for a totally different reason than one would expect. It is all because of the story’s psychopathic villain, Duke Cael Hartheon, who goes on to torture the female lead in unspeakable ways. But a bad drunken night results in Evelyn getting tied up with the literal worst character in the novel. Now forced into an impending marriage, Evelyn will do whatever she can to make Cael sick of her and leave her first. But if only the blood-red duke didn’t turn out to be such a green flag...!

(Source: Tappytoon)

title: 죽은 아내가 돌아왔다
summary:
The only daughter of South Korea's white hat hacker, Lee Eun-Jo, who seemed to have everything anyone could desire.
As she was thrown from the top of a 46-story apartment building, she cried out more desperately than anyone else. 


Please, anyone, save me.



Then, like fate itself, a phrase appeared before her eyes.


[Interfere with fate? YES or NO]



Fate? Interfere? What the hell is this? Who cares? Yeah, it's over now. Since it's over, no need to hesitate!


[YES!!!]



And so she opened her eyes, alive. In the body of a woman with the same name... rough, shallow, and a bit vulgar, Na Eun-Jo.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 은퇴 성녀가 집값 올려드립니다
summary:
The male lead, who had been repeatedly reincarnating, went mad and turned the entire empire into a sea of flames. I ended up possessing the body of a character in the web novel If You Pick Up a Sword, You Might as Well Slit Someone's Throat...And of all things, I became one of the countless saintesses. My goal is singular...

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: 너에게 빼앗을 왕관
summary:
"I wanted him so badly that I would have given up everything for him... And in the end, I did." After losing her crown, her children, and her life to the man she loved, Princess Medea finds herself back in her 17-year-old body. Now aware of the treacherous alliance between her ex-lover and her uncle, who have been scheming for the throne and fueling a rebellion, she's determined to save her kingdom and seize the reins of her future. Can the princess escape a tragic death and reclaim her destiny?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 약탈혼으로 남편부터 바꾸겠습니다
summary:
Farewell, Miss Original Female Lead. Three cycles of despair and death. At the end of each, I realized the woman who stole my husband and everything else was actually a possessor. The fourth return—now is the time to reclaim everything stolen.
To do so, I needed a powerful ally. To a madwoman, a madman.


“Plunder me.”


Crown Prince Arpad Eastrid. I requested a marriage of plunder from him.


 “In return, I'll keep Your Highness from going mad.”



An offer he absolutely couldn't refuse. I stared straight at him, wearing a triumphant smile.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 복수는 이렇게 하는 거다
summary:
Grace, a girl who lost her parents and even her family, has held only one thing in her heart for 13 years: revenge. And then there’s Ares, who lost everything to the same enemy. Seeking revenge, Grace proposes a fake relationship with him, and the two enter into a cold pact. However, the feelings that sprout in the flames of revenge gradually blossom into love, and she fears that these feelings will become an obstacle to her revenge. Caught between revenge and love, what choice will these two make as they race towards the end?

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 시한부 아기 의원이 천재인 걸 안 숨김
summary:
In my third life, just before becoming the empire's top councilor and returning to my original world... I was deceived by the emperor, lost my life, and reset back to age three. I refuse to reincarnate again! In my past life, my abilities blossomed, but the problem was I had no one to protect me. My trump card was my uncle, the greatest warrior, who was exiled to the East after contracting an incurable disease...

...my father. Treating him would give me a powerful ally! I hate it with a passion, but it's my last resort. I have no choice but to meet that despicable father who never once came looking for me.


 “Father, this is a contract and a deal. I'll cure you if you become my guardian.”


Me... will I be able to return this time?

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 남편이 최애인데 이혼당할 것 같다
summary:
When I realized I had transmigrated as the woman destined to marry my favorite character, Duke Euclid Ludion, I was over the moon. Only cloud on the horizon: I'm a villainess, and based on the storyline, we're headed straight for a divorce. But I won't let that happen! Time to undo all of my character's evil deeds, clear my reputation, use my generous dowry to save Euclid's house from ruin, and win over his beloved wards. Surely, this will be enough to guarantee our happily-ever-after... right?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 남주들과 외딴섬에 갇혀버렸다
summary:
Being stranded on an island with the five hot male leads of an erotic novel? That sounds like many women's dream... Except, when you've reincarnated as the villainess that all said hotties hate with a burning passion, it's closer to a nightmare. And that's without even counting the monsters that roam the island! As a former scout instructor, Margaret can handle the wilderness, but she never learned how to deal with buff men with homicidal tendencies. Let's just hope she can take the heat!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 내가 죽은 뒤 꼬마 신랑은
summary:
Despite being bound by a political marriage, Livenia and Heinrich form a bond and slowly become the family neither of them ever had. That is, until Livenia’s sudden death tears them apart. After being reborn into a new body, she vows to shed the cruel judgment she faced as a young duchess, but seeing Heinrich still trapped in the shadow of her death even 10 years later shakes her resolve. Will she embrace her new life or return to her former groom's side to keep the promise she once made?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 몰락한 명가의 플레이어
summary:
Lee Yun, the youngest son of the Sermin family, a prominent house on the Dreia Continent. The once peaceful family descends into ruin after the disappearance of his father and brothers. And in the moment everything collapses, Lee Yun is captured by the Paton family and meets his end after horrific torture. But when he opened his eyes, he found himself not in reality, but in Adeon; an endless battlefield and playground of the gods. In that place where countless players lost their lives, Lee Yun grew into the Ghost King, a master player who mastered all classes: Assassin, Necromancer, and Ghost. He challenged the gods.
He met his end in defeat, but his story did not end there. The moment he awoke again, he had returned to his childhood at age twelve, retaining the power of a player. To prevent his family's downfall and reclaim everything lost, Ri-yun now begins transforming reality into his own game board. His first target is bloody vengeance against the Paton family, another great clan that destroyed the Sermin family and killed him.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: 금빛 슈발리에
summary:
After losing her parents, Seirena is forced to marry an elderly king and endure terrible abuse. Moreover, her uncle betrays her and eventually kills her. That should have been the end... But she wakes up back in the past, before this tragedy unfolded. This time, Seirena has a plan. She will change her fate by becoming a Chevalier, the highest rank of knight, to protect herself and her family. But having a relationship with her handsome captain was not part of her plan!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 흑막의 유모로 위장취업
summary:
When the author of a romantic fantasy novel wakes up in her own story, she's mortified to find out that she's just a side character who eventually gets killed off! Determined to escape the outcome she wrote herself into, she decides to adopt a new identity. Now, as Bella, she not only escapes becoming the emperor's concubine who's eventually executed, but she also becomes the nanny of her novel's final villain, Eren Winthrop. Can she set right the terrible ending she created in the first place?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 해시태그는 첫사랑
summary:
I-Sol Yeon, the school’s top student and biggest outcast, gains the ability to see people’s true feelings about her through the Hashtag Lens, which she acquires after making the ten‑quintillionth wish. Through the lens, she discovers that Shin-U Seong, her former middle‑school best friend she had a painful fallout with, has tagged her as “#my_first_love_and_trash.” Can I-Sol mend their broken relationship and overcome the pain of being betrayed by her first love?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 사천당가의 시비로 살아남기
summary:
An ordinary woman who once dreamed of the Martial World awakens as Dang Sohye, a lowly handmaiden serving the Sacheon Dang Clan, a house notorious for its poison techniques. She thinks she’s possessed a doomed extra, but this body is anything but ordinary. As the clan’s fearsome grand elder takes her in and a young swordsman from the Namgung clan notices her, she’s swept into a deadly power struggle. Can she master the Dang Clan’s techniques and survive the schemes closing in from within?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 네 목을 비트는 새벽
summary:
Arsinoe knows a few things about redos. Her first three lives all followed the same tragic script: born the scorned daughter of an enslaved queen, married to a crown prince as charming as he is cruel, and driven to death by the very man she trusted. But in her fourth, Arsinoe refuses to play the doomed princess. Determined to claim her own destiny, she forms an unexpected alliance with Walter Heibergh, the kingdom’s most formidable commander — one powerful enough to change fate itself.

(Source: Tapas)

title: 집순인데, 피폐감금물에 빙의해 버렸다
summary:
After dying from overwork, a woman is reincarnated as April Salt, a minor character forced to serve the demanding princess. Doomed to another life of endless labor, her fate changes when she is accidentally kidnapped by the undeniably handsome Grand Duke Kaian Braille. Instead of dying again, she is confined in luxury, with every need met. What should be a prison starts feeling like paradise. If only everyone would stop bothering her and let her do nothing!

(Source: Tapas)

title: 7번의 결혼이 예정되어 있습니다
summary:
As the heir to the ultra-powerful Noblisse family, Agatha has been a pawn in the emperor’s political game her whole life. He had her married off, not just once or twice, but six times! After her most recent matrimonial fiasco, Agatha seizes the chance to take control of her destiny and choose her next husband herself. Handsome, powerful, and a war hero, Enoch Aratus couldn’t be more perfect for the job. But nothing disrupts a political marriage faster than actually falling for your husband…

(Source: Tapas)

title: 다정한 나의 괴물을 위하여
summary:
"From today on, I will never see you again."

 Helena, abandoned by her husband on their wedding day, is about to break the vicious bond. But just as she's about to sever ties, her and her husband's bodies switch.

 "One year from now. If you don't reconnect your fate, you will die as the natural course of events dictates."

With this profound prophecy, the fates of the two begin to waver.

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: 주인공을 입양했더니 장르가 바뀌었다
summary:
Nobody understands why the wicked Belinda Blanche is giving special treatment to her child servant. They don't realize she's actually from the modern world, and her servant's the hero of her favorite childcare game! All Belinda wants is to give the hero the love he deserves, but the game keeps twisting her words to make her sound like a third-rate villain. Can Belinda beat the game and figure out how to fangirl without saying a single kind word? Or will she be forced to play the bad guy forever?

(Source: Tapas)

title: 외모지상주의
summary:
Daniel is an unattractive loner who wakes up in a different body. Now tall, handsome, and cooler than ever in his new form, Daniel aims to achieve everything he couldn't before. How far will he go to keep his body... and his secrets?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: 두번사는랭커
summary:
Yeonwoo’s brother disappeared years ago, and he’s devastated to learn of his death. As he copes with his loss, he’s given a pocket watch and learns there’s more to his brother’s death: he was betrayed while competing in the Tower of the Sun God. Now it’s Yeonwoo’s turn to use the knowledge his brother left behind. Can Yeonwoo (call sign: Cain) navigate that world and gain enough power and experience to reach the top of the tower, defeating his brother’s enemies and all those who stand in his way?



(Source: Tapas)
